Post-Schedule Sequences (What To Send
Them Before The Call or Consult)
Here’s 	the 	ONE 	email 	we 	use 	before 	PCG 	applicants 	talk
to 	someone 	from 	our 	team 	about 	becoming 	members.
What’s 	funny 	is 	even 	though 	they 	rarely 	ever 	schedule 	a
time 	to 	talk 	to 	Natalia, 	the 	email 	has 	been 	referencing
her 	(and 	has 	remained 	unchanged) 	since 	late 	2017.
Email 1 (and only): Send right after they schedule:
NAME - before you talk to my wife.
Hey {first_name} - I see you're scheduled to talk to Natalia about working
together.
Glad to hear it!
Before you guys talk, I figured you might want to listen to this:
https://thelifecoachschool.com/190/
It's a podcast episode by one of our current clients, Brook Castillo,
describing what she learned working with me during her first few years as a
client. (She's still a client by the way).
Pretty good content in there too! She teaches my stuff better than I do
sometimes :-)
Anyway - thought you might like it - plus it gives you a good idea of what it's
like to work together.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

Frank
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
